name: Spiced Vegetable Pasties
recipeInstructions:
Filling.
1. Fry the onion in the oil for 5 minutes and add the garlic, spices, carrot, and potato. Cook for ten minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
2. Add the chick peas and season with salt and pepper. Allow to cool.
Pastry:
1. Sift the flour and salt into a large bowl. Add the margarine and rub into the flour with your hands until the mixture is like breadcrumbs.
2. Gradually add cold water and press the mixture together to form a dough. Turn out onto a floured board and divide into 2 equal pieces.
3. Take one piece of the dough and knead lightly, pressing it into a round shape.
4. Roll it into a circle about 15cm across. Place half of the vegetable mixture on top and fold into a pasty type shape, pressing the edges together.
5. Pierce a couple of holes in the top and bake for 20 minutes or until crisp.
This recipe is also nice with filo pastry, or the samosa packets you can buy. If using filo pastry, remember to brush the outside with some melted margarine or butter to prevent sticking.
